name: hardhat
context: Deploy Solidity contracts using Hardhat Ignition with TypeScript deployment modules
info: Hardhat is a JavaScript/TypeScript development environment for Ethereum. Deployment uses Hardhat Ignition, which defines deployment modules as declarative TypeScript. Ignition handles dependency ordering, constructor args, and deployment tracking. It supports local (Hardhat Network), testnet, and mainnet targets. Configure networks in `hardhat.config.ts` with RPC URLs and accounts. After deployment, Ignition writes artifacts to `ignition/deployments/` including deployed addresses and ABIs.

sections.title: Project setup
sections.body: Install hardhat and toolbox: `npm install --save-dev hardhat @nomicfoundation/hardhat-toolbox`. Initialize with `npx hardhat init`. Choose TypeScript when prompted.

sections.title: Ignition deployment module
sections.body: Create deployment modules in `ignition/modules/`. Use `buildModule` to define contracts, parameters, and dependencies. Ignition resolves deployment order automatically. Parameters can be passed via `--parameters` flag or JSON file.

sections.title: Deploy command
sections.body: `npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/MyContract.ts --network <name>`. Add `--verify` to verify on deploy. Add `--parameters '{"MyContract": {"arg1": "value"}}'` for constructor args. Deployment state is tracked in `ignition/deployments/`.

links.context: Parent deployment skill with general workflow
Create the deployer wallet used in hardhat.config accounts
Post-deploy verification with Hardhat verify plugin

related.note: Foundry is the Rust-based alternative to Hardhat

scripts.name: Hardhat Deploy
scripts.description: Deploy a contract using Hardhat Ignition
